## What & why
<!-- What does this change, and why? Link an issue if there is one: Closes #123 -->

## Type
- [ ] Lesson content (new or fix)
- [ ] Scaffolder / tooling
- [ ] Docs / site
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
- [ ] `mkdocs build` passes with no broken links or footnotes
- [ ] If a lesson: follows the [authoring rubric](../meta/PHASE_AUTHORING_GUIDE.md) (visual-first, footnote citations, Test-Yourself, quiz.json)
- [ ] Sources are authoritative and cited as footnotes (no Reddit/forum/low-quality)
- [ ] Notable change added under `Unreleased` in [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) (if applicable)
